title: Reports
description: Structured briefings, recurring schedules, and stakeholder-ready exports.
readOnly: Read-only — analyst or admin access required.
unavailable: Reports are unavailable until you join a workspace with data access.

weekly_competitor_pulse.label: Weekly competitor pulse
weekly_competitor_pulse.description: Executive snapshot of the biggest competitor moves, signals, and recommended responses.

promo_digest.label: Promo digest
promo_digest.description: Promotion-focused view of discount behavior, urgency tactics, and offer pressure.

messaging_analysis.label: Messaging analysis
messaging_analysis.description: Narrative, CTA, category, and positioning changes across the tracked competitor set.

custom_report.label: Custom report
custom_report.description: Build a bespoke briefing by choosing exactly which sections, competitors, and date range to include.

schedules.title: Saved schedules
schedules.subtitle: Recurring templates that generate automatically for your team.
schedules.activeScheduleDesc: Inactive schedules stay saved but are ignored by the due runner.

recentRuns.title: Recent runs
recentRuns.subtitle: Last generated reports — click to inspect the full briefing.

scheduleDialog.description: Save recurring report settings for this workspace. Due schedules can be generated manually now and attached to a cron runner later.

builderDialog.title: Custom report builder
builderDialog.description: Choose which sections to include, the date range, and optional competitor filters.
builderDialog.competitorFilterHint: Comma-separated names. Leave blank to include all.
builderDialog.noSectionsWarning: Select at least one section to generate a report.

viewer.failedDesc: The report run failed before a payload could be saved.
viewer.insightsSubtitle: {{count}} structured insight ready for team review
viewer.insightsSubtitle_plural: {{count}} structured insights ready for team review
viewer.actionsSubtitle: Concrete follow-up moves derived from the highest-signal findings
viewer.noChartData: No chart data available in this report.

pipeline.title: Report pipeline
pipeline.description: Reports reuse live workspace analytics, structured insights, and competitor intelligence snapshots. Every run is stored as a structured payload for reuse and export.
pipeline.step1: On-demand generation: template to `reports-center` to analytics RPC + insights + competitor intelligence to persisted `report_runs.payload`.
pipeline.step2: Scheduled generation: saved `report_schedules` compute `next_run_at`; the due runner can generate all overdue schedules for the current workspace in one pass.
pipeline.step3: Exports: JSON for structured downstream use, plus a print-friendly view that can be saved as PDF from the browser.

emptyReport: Generate or select a report run above to inspect the full briefing.
